understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete levels by maneuvering selectable pieces (P/S) onto goal positions (+) and possibly pushing blocks (B) onto goals, within a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_*) shifts the selected piece (P) in the direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects like blocks (B); walls (#) block movement variably. CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at the exact target_position coordinates, costing a step. Coordinates are pixel-based (3px/cell), and blocked hints are heuristics.
